title: Opening
description: Opening: A cutout or hole in a building surface/panel (e.g. Window, Rooflight)

Edges.description: A collection of FrameEdges which define the external boundary of the opening.

OpeningConstruction.description: A construction object providing construction information about the opening - typically glazing construction

FrameCornerType.description: Frame edge treatment at corners (ie Mitred, Vertical Extends, or Horizontal Extends) FrameCornerType: The type of join at frame corners

Type.description: The type of opening on a panel (e.g. Window, Door). Use OpeningType enum OpeningType: The type of cutout or hole in a building surface/panel (e.g. Window, Door, Rooflight)

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
